$comment: Sibling-repo layout. Supervisor at C:\Development\Alex_ACT_Supervisor manages two siblings. Paths resolved relative to repo root.

edition.name: Alex_ACT_Edition
edition.role: Repo template — heirs deploy from here

mall.name: Alex_Skill_Mall

inventory_exclusions.$comment: Folders that have .github/copilot-instructions.md but are NOT heirs — they're the master, the template, the mall, this Supervisor, alpha/legacy work, or backups. Match is case-insensitive on the folder basename.
